::: {.chapter-num}
Chapter I
:::

## A first glance {.chapter-title}

::: {.chapter-lede}
Before we look at any patterns, it's worth seeing the shape of what you've been keeping.
Which kinds of things you log most often tells us a lot about where to look next — and what the rest of this page can and can't tell you.
:::

::: {.analysis-section}

### Snapshot

The bars below count every observation in your export, grouped by category.
The longest bar is what you log most.
If a category has only a handful of entries, the patterns later on in this page will be wobbly for that category — there's just not much to go on.

```{webr}
#| label: fact-snapshot
#| input: ["fileText"]

if (exists("visible")) {
  v_no_fc <- visible[!grepl("^Funcap", visible$category), ]
  cat_n <- sort(table(v_no_fc$category), decreasing = TRUE)
  top_cat <- names(cat_n)[1]
  top_n   <- as.integer(cat_n[1])
  bot_cat <- names(cat_n)[length(cat_n)]
  bot_n   <- as.integer(cat_n[length(cat_n)])

  htmltools::HTML(sprintf(
    paste0(
      '<p class="section-fact">',
      'Your most-tracked category is <strong>%s</strong> ',
      '(<strong>%s</strong> observations); your least-tracked is ',
      '<strong>%s</strong> (<strong>%s</strong>). Funcap entries are excluded — they\'re a separate questionnaire.',
      '</p>'
    ),
    top_cat, format(top_n, big.mark = ","),
    bot_cat, format(bot_n, big.mark = ",")
  ))
}
```

```{webr}
#| label: chart-snapshot
#| input: ["fileText", "darkMode"]

if (exists("visible")) {
  viz <- viz_theme(darkMode)
  visible |>
    filter(!grepl("^Funcap", category)) |>
    count(category, sort = TRUE) |>
    mutate(category = fct_reorder(category, n)) |>
    ggplot(aes(n, category)) +
    geom_col(fill = viz$secondary) +
    labs(x = "Observations", y = NULL,
         title = "Tracker volume by category",
         subtitle = "Funcap questionnaire categories excluded") +
    viz$theme(base_size = 13)
}
```

:::
